name: Potato-Cheese Dream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water to cover for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender. Drain.
2. Place cottage cheese, egg substitute, and red pepper in an electric blender or food processor. Process for 1 minute or until smooth. Set aside.
3. Place half of the potatoes in a 8-inch square baking dish coated with cooking spray. Layer with half each of cheese, green onions, parsley, and cottage cheese mixture.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, reserving parsley.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Sprinkle remaining parsley over top.
